task_completion.description: Verify the Market Analyzer window is open with the required instruments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Market Analyzer' window is visible in NinjaTrader 8. The Instrument column contains rows for 'SPY', 'AAPL', and 'MSFT'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Net Change %' column is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is a column header titled 'Net Change %' (or similar) present in the Market Analyzer grid.

task_completion.description: Verify the conditional cell coloring is applied to the 'Net Change %' column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Net Change %' column, cells containing positive values have a green-toned background, and cells containing negative values have a red-toned background.

task_completion.description: Verify the grid is sorted by 'Net Change %' in descending order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values in the 'Net Change %' column are ordered from highest at the top to lowest at the bottom, and/or there is a downward-pointing sort indicator arrow on the 'Net Change %' column header.

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace is saved as 'HeatmapTask'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader Control Center title bar shows the active workspace name as 'HeatmapTask', or 'HeatmapTask' is visible and highlighted in the Workspaces menu.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the Market Analyzer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual NinjaTrader 8 application interface (menus, dialogs, windows) being used, rather than a terminal, text editor, or script modifying XML workspace files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the Market Analyzer displays actual numerical data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The cells for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT contain actual numbers/percentages, indicating genuine interaction with the platform's data engine rather than a mocked or manually typed text display.

integrity.description: Verify the output is a genuine application window and not a mockup.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Windows and NinjaTrader UI elements (borders, scrollbars, context menus) are present and render correctly without signs of image editing or fake HTML tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required instruments: SPY, AAPL, MSFT. Required column: 'Net Change %' (internally NetChangePercent). Positive values must have a green-family background (e.g., Green, Lime, LightGreen, DarkGreen, SeaGreen, PaleGreen). Negative values must have a red-family background (e.g., Red, Pink, LightPink, DarkRed, Crimson, IndianRed). The grid must be sorted descending by Net Change %. The workspace must be saved as 'HeatmapTask' (typically visible in the Control Center title bar or Workspaces menu).
